issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being assigned duplicate tasks across multiple workflows, including the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was identified as a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations, which HubSpot confirmed and resolved. HubSpot acknowledged intermittent issues with associations and filters on their platform.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks to avoid confusion.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Home advisors continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for these deal stages. Madelaine Davis made a tweak to the filters on March 9 to address the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger for closing info collection. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine Davis updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: For any deals that cycled through Offer Accepted and back during the impact window and did not generate TC tasks, manually enroll the deal into the TC workflow.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the newly assigned LO. The issue affected at least one deal where LO was changed to Julie Yocum but emails still referenced Paul. Luis investigated and resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually send corrected emails to agents with the updated loan officer information.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC (and some TurboHome) deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment or generating tasks for transaction coordinators. HubSpot support was engaged and the issue was resolved after a support conversation. MRC leads commonly have no loan officer assigned, though this was not confirmed as the root cause.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC or TurboHome deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.

issues.title: Turbohome check status task and extra Call 1 task triggering on workflow enrollment
issues.desc: An unwanted 'turbohome check status' task and an additional 'Call 1' task were triggering 10 minutes after a lead was placed on a workflow. This was reported by a home advisor and Madelaine confirmed she would turn them off. The tasks were confirmed disabled.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any spurious turbohome check status or duplicate Call 1 tasks that appeared on leads enrolled during the impact window.
